Description.SourceString:
As the war against the trees continues, more and more power weapons are needed to bring the bark-clad oppressors to their knees. As the wood hardens, preparing for attack, stronger materials are required to shatter their defences. 

Steel is a newer weapon in the lumberjack's arsenal. A sturdy metal, durable and strong, capable of felling the might willow strategists who whisper their deadly battleplans to the other trees. If the woodcutter army can destroy these wispy, willowy, strategists, they might be able to turn the tables in this arboreal conflict.
